C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM # 503B. MICHAEL ROSSOFF, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. MITCH LYON CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: LOUIS THELEMAQUE AND DEMARIS THELEMAQUE, PLAINTIFFS WITH THEIR ATTORNEY D. SUNENA SABHARWAL. ALSO PRESENT WAS ATTORNEY FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, EVAN H. ACKIRON AND PETER MALILI ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANTS. CASE SETTLED. TERMS: DEFENDANT, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANICSCO AGREES TO PAY TO PLAINTIFFS LOUIS AND DEMARIS THELEMAQUE THE SUM OF $11,000.00. PLAINITFFS LOUIS AND DEMARIS THELEMAQUE AGREE TO EXERCISE THE RELIEF OF ALL LIABILITY IN THIS ACTION IN CONSIDERATION FOR THE PAYMENT OF THE $11,000.00 EVEN IF INJURIES ARE LATER DISCOVERED. THIS SETTLEMENT IS CONDITIONAL UPON APPROVAL BY THE CITY ATTY. AND THE BOARD OF SUPERVISORS.
